title: Travel illness return review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler
source.jurisdiction: United States federal public-health guidance for international travel; requires UAE communicable-disease and referral adaptation
source.population: Ill recent international travelers, with destination, itinerary, timing, exposure, host, syndrome and incubation-period qualifiers.
source.setting: Initial clinical triage and evaluation after international travel.
source.exclusions: Exact for travel history, exposure, timing, syndrome and initial evaluation documentation. It does not generate a diagnosis, test panel, isolation decision, treatment, referral or urgency classification.

exact_location.heading: Introduction and triage of the ill returned traveler

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording recent international travel, illness timing, severity, vital-sign and infection-control context, with urgent decisions left to the assessing clinician.

assessment.text: Supports itinerary, subnational destination, dates, travel style, accommodation, bites, animals, freshwater, food, water, sexual and fellow-traveler illness history without assigning an infection.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to entered itinerary and exposure history without assigning an infection.

source.title: Post-Travel Evaluation of the Ill Traveler

exact_location.heading: The post-travel evaluation — association with travel and exposures
exact_location.locator: official chapter sections “Association of the traveler’s illness with (recent) travel” and “Exposures”

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports itinerary, subnational destination, dates, travel style, accommodation, bites, animals, freshwater, food, water, sexual and fellow-traveler illness history without assigning an infection.

assessment.text: Supports clinician recording of underlying conditions, medicines, vaccination, prophylaxis, symptom syndrome, onset relative to travel and incubation context without generating tests or a diagnosis.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to clinician assessment of host, syndrome and incubation context without generating a differential or test panel.
